summary: LeadFinder UI modernization testing complete. Verified removal of Tools tab and Google Maps Leads section. All 4 tabs (HOME, WHATSAPP, EMAIL, STATS) working correctly. 9 backend API tests pass. 27 frontend tests pass.

critical_code_review_comments: Code cleanup successful: ~337 lines of dead code removed including Tools tab, Google Maps leads section, and orphaned functions
Tab structure correctly updated to 4 tabs: HOME (zoeken), WHATSAPP (leads), EMAIL, STATS (dashboard)
No broken Tools tab visible or accessible - correctly removed
All existing leads preserved (4 leads: Salon Beauty, Nieuw Bedrijf, TEST_Legacy_1775593535, Test Kapper Email)
Theme toggle works correctly with localStorage persistence
Dutch language maintained throughout the app

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42: Tested LeadFinder UI modernization. 4 tabs verified: HOME (search + status overview), WHATSAPP (CSV leads table with bulk messaging), EMAIL (email campaign automation), STATS (dashboard with lead statistics). Tools tab successfully removed. Key data-testids: theme-toggle-button, csv-import-button, csv-export-button, csv-clear-all, csv-leads-table, csv-status-filter, bulk-whatsapp-bar. Password: yrvante2025. 4 leads in database.
